name: Certificates Using Weak Key Sizes
description: Identifies certificates using RSA keys smaller than 2048 bits or ECC keys smaller than 256 bits
query: SELECT id, domain, issuer, key_algorithm, key_size FROM certificates WHERE (key_algorithm = 'RSA' AND key_size < 2048) OR (key_algorithm LIKE 'EC%' AND key_size < 256)
remediation: Replace the certificate with one using RSA 2048-bit or higher, or ECC P-256 or higher keys.
